title: $ltrim
text: $ltrim Trim the left side of a string from the left, following a pattern. $ltrim ( Source , Pattern ) Example: vString = $ltrim("xxxxUniface","x") Parameters Table 1. Parameters Parameter Data Type Description Source String String to be left trimmed. Pattern String Pattern to remove. It can be a constant string, regex string, or syntax string. For more information, see Syntax Strings for Pattern Matching and Regex Strings for Pattern Matching . Return Values Trimmed string. Use Allowed in all component types. Example: Using $ltrim Explain this code vString1="xxxxUniface" vString2 = $ltrim(vString1,"x") ; vString2 now contains "Uniface" Copy vString = $ltrim("xxxxUnifacexxxx",$regex("x")) ; vString now is "Unifacexxxx" vString = $ltrim("xxxx",$regex("x")) ; vString now is ""vString = $ltrim("1111234567890111uniface",$regex("\d")) ; vString now is "uniface" Copy Related Links $rtrim Trim a string on the right-hand side, following a pattern.
